rationale: An equivalence theorem (==) whose statement asserts logical equivalence, so def:log-equiv is load-bearing and was missing. The sibling equivalence laws thm:qdist (0038) and thm:qneg (0039) both list def:log-equiv directly; qcomm must match.
notes: Harmonizes the same-set trio qcomm/qdist/qneg to {def:existential-q, def:universal-q, def:log-equiv}.
